headline: Apartments.com Launches RentPulse, New Quarterly Index Highlighting the Deeply Divided Rental Market
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., May 14, 2026--Today, Apartments.com, an industry-leading online marketplace of CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), released its inaugural Apartments.com RentPulse Index, a new quarterly measure designed to track the financial and behavioral health of renters across the United States. Unlike traditional rent reports that focus solely on pricing, the RentPulse Index synthesizes proprietary Apartments.com and CoStar Group data into a recurring framework that measures renter condition

headline: Events pushed Barcelona's April occupancy to 9-year high; RevPAR jumped 10.7% year-over-year to EUR164.93, with occupancy peaking at 95.5% during Bridal Fashion Week and FCE/SeaFood festival.
summary: ARLINGTON, Va. - Boosted by several events, Barcelona's hotel industry saw its highest April occupancy since 2017, according to preliminary data from CoStar, a leading global provider of commercial...

headline: FIBO 2026 boosted Cologne hotel performance in April; RevPAR jumped 8.7% year-over-year with peak occupancy hitting 96.5% on the trade show's opening night.
summary: ARLINGTON, Va. - Cologne's hotel industry saw a spike in performance during FIBO 2026, according to preliminary data from CoStar, leading global provider of online real estate marketplaces,...

headline: Top 3 Real Estate Stocks You'll Regret Missing In Q2
summary: Opportunity to buy undervalued real estate stocks with RSI below 30: FPI, WHLR, CSGP. FPI down 12%, WHLR down 49%, CSGP up 20% in Q1, according to Benzinga Pro.
